channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipped suitcase and bag, 6th April
item.description:
Fly tipped suitcase and bag
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manthorp Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items, 6th April
item.description:
Flytipped rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warepoint Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden planks flytipped, 6th April
item.description:
Wooden planks have been flytipped on this corner over the weekend. It's becoming a hotspot for flytipping.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Dagmar Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 6th April
item.description:
Loads of rubbish on here and the main Bronze Age way. Can we make our area clean please as it’s been there for weeks already?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bronze Age Way, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All bins are full and rubbish all over the groud, 6th April
item.description:
These bins are continuously overflowing. It’s not occasionally. They need emptying daily or need to be bigger. This is going to encourage vermin. Not acceptable for a public street in Bromley! Maybe Tesco / One Stop need to take some responsibility.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazel Walk, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped behind houses and blocking access, 6th April
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped on the common which is blocking access to houses

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdown Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree down, 6th April
item.description:
Massive tree down on hackford road outside school, please come to clear? thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hackford Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal rails/ grills dumped by wall on Heversham Road, 6th April
item.description:
Two large metal grill/rails have been dumped by the wall on Heversham Road. This fly tipping could easily fall with the wind and injure someone

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heversham Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost on during the day, off at night, 6th April
item.description:
Lamppost on during the day, off at night. There are elderly people that live on this road and due to it being dark at night, it causes a fall risk
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lanridge Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 6th April
item.description:
Dullsville ... Please why do we need a public bin here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 x Chairs have been fly tipped here., 6th April
item.description:
5 x Chairs have been dumped on the corner of the brick wall just on the grass.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mulgrave Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 6th April
item.description:
Behind Thurston house on Calverley close Beckenham there is a pathway that leads into Beckenham place park. As you enter the pathway there is a dead rotting fox which smells very bad. The fox is to the left as you enter from the Calverley close side.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Calverley Close, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped behind Stamford Hill station, 6th April
item.description:
Please remove furniture dumped at the top of Holmdale Terrace

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rudbeck House, Flats 9-16 blocked rubbish shute between 1st and 2nd floors, 6th April
item.description:
The rubbish shute is blocked between 1st and 2nd floors. Also, the left hinge is out of place and needs putting back. The shutes need a jet wash as well as they are extremely filthy. Please assist. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in door well, 6th April
item.description:
Looks like a rough sleeper is using the door well and has left cardboard and bedding

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91 - 95, Southwark Bridge Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dozens of dog poo bags, 6th April
item.description:
Dozens of dog poo bags Excessive litter and fly tipping Nappies

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti in a door well, 6th April
item.description:
Green graffiti in a door well on Southwark bridge road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91 - 95, Southwark Bridge Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Charity shop between Kate’s hairdressers and Morley’s, 6th April
item.description:
Today I walked along the parade in Pickford lane, outside the charity shop next to Morley’s take away shop someone has left a bag of grass cuttings and shredded paper plus empty wine bottles! Disgusting the shredded paper will end up over the parade causing more litter. Can anything get done to stop these bags of rubbish being left outside these shops? A sofa was dumped the other day at the end of the parade where there is another charity shop! 3 charity shops in one small parade is ridiculous and causing a mess.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unauthorised graffiti on three commercial bins - Play LDN at 97 Wick Rd, London E9 5AB, 6th April
item.description:
Unauthorised graffiti on three commercial waste bins located outside Play LDN at 97 Wick Rd, London E9 5AB. The bins have been spray-painted with the name “Play LDN.”

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wick Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full black rubbish bag by bin, 6th April
item.description:
Rubbish bag by bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
